questions.question: What Renaissance man designed the dome for St. Peter's Basilica in Rome?
Who, according to Carl Perkins, had an advantage because he didn't look 'like Mr. Ed, like a lot of the rest of us'?
What company did the Justice Department levy a fine of $1 million per day against, in 1997?
What method of sterilization is used on food for all U.S. space flights?
What country's national soccer squad is most often called 'The World's Team'?
What Welsh poet's last words were: 'I've had 18 straight whiskeys. I think that's the record'?
